name: kaggriculture_beginner
title: Kaggriculture (Beginner)
description: Beginner farming simulation: two players each tend a 5x5 farm, buying seeds and planting/watering/harvesting crops to maximize end-of-season money. Prices are fixed; no animals, town, inventory, or farm hands.

boardSize.description: Width and height (in tiles) of each player's square farm.

turnsPerDay.description: Number of turns that make up one in-game day.

maxMarketOrdersPerTurn.description: Maximum number of market orders processed per player per turn. Extra orders beyond this limit are silently dropped.

reward.description: Player money at end of game (final score).

farms.description: Per-player farm state. Each entry: {money, seeds, farmer:[x,y], tiles:[[tile|null,...],...]}. Shared across agents.

action.description: Per-turn action: {"farmer": [op, ...args], "market": [[op, ...args], ...]}. Farmer ops: NORTH, SOUTH, EAST, WEST, PLANT <crop>, WATER, HARVEST, PASS. Market ops: BUY_SEED <crop> <n>.
